title: SenML codec — RFC 8428 CBOR pack/unpack
description: Implement lichen/senml/codec.py: RFC 8428 SenML records with CBOR encoding (Content-Format 112). Needs: SenmlRecord dataclass with fields (bn, bt, bu, n, u, v, vs, vb, t, s, vd) using numeric CBOR keys per RFC 8428 Table 4; pack(records) -> bytes and unpack(data) -> list[SenmlRecord] using cbor2; base name pattern urn:dev:mac:<EUI-64>: and relative timestamp support.
close_reason: SenML codec, profiles, and observable resources implemented; all tests passing
